text:
Chronic Conditions Warehouse Virtual Research Data Center 
Medicare Part D Event (PDE)/Drug Characteristics Codebook │ July 2025 │ V 1.8 
44 
PROD_SRVC_ID 
LABEL: 
Product Service ID 
DESCRIPTION: This field identifies the dispensed drug product using a National Drug Code (NDC). 
The NDC is reported in NDC11 format. In instances where a pharmacy formulates a compound 
containing multiple NDC drugs, the NDC of the most expensive drug is used. 
SHORT NAME: PRDSRVID 
LONG NAME: PROD_SRVC_ID 
TYPE:
